recommendations.title: The Monkey King
recommendations.overview: A stick-wielding monkey teams with a young girl on an epic quest for immortality, battling demons, dragons, gods — and his own ego — along the way.

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: ICHI
recommendations.overview: Ichi is a blind entertainer that travels the countryside with her traditional Japanese guitar and walking stick. She’s in search for the kind man that brought her up as a child, but because of her beauty she encounters problems every step of the way.

recommendations.title: The Bridges of Madison County
recommendations.overview: Photographer Robert Kincaid wanders into the life of housewife Francesca Johnson for four days in the 1960s.

recommendations.title: Hilda and the Mountain King
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Hilda wakes up in the body of a troll, she must use her wits and courage to get back home, become human again — and save the city of Trolberg.

recommendations.title: A Charlie Brown Christmas
recommendations.overview: When Charlie Brown complains about the overwhelming materialism that he sees amongst everyone during the Christmas season, Lucy suggests that he become director of the school Christmas pageant. Charlie Brown accepts, but it is a frustrating struggle.

recommendations.title: Merry Christmas, Drake & Josh
recommendations.overview: Step brothers Drake and Josh must give a foster family the best Christmas ever or face years in jail for a Christmas party gone wrong.

recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.

recommendations.title: A Flintstones Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: Fred is cast as Ebenezer Scrooge in a stage adaption of the classic Christmas story, but is acting a bit stingy in real life.
